source_text: The voltage rating of the Overcurrent Protection must be equal to or higher than the maximum segment voltage EV.7.4.5 Overcurrent Protection is not required on a voltage sense wire if all three of the following conditions are met: - AMS is a distributed AMS system (one cell measurement per board) - $\quad$ Sense wire length is less than 25 mm - AMS board has Overcurrent Protection # EV.7.5 Accumulator Temperature EV.7.5.1
requirement_text_pred: AMS is a distributed AMS system (one cell measurement per board)
